candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortisation and impairment of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A-like line exists above operating profit, so COGS selected row ('Goods for resale') does not appear to include this same-level line. However, the row is a combined total that also includes impairment and is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales-specific, so allocating it to COGS_DA would risk misclassification and double counting.

variables.notes: No COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is visible. The only explicit D&A-like row is a combined operating total including impairment and without bucket attribution, so it should not be added to COGS_DA automatically.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortisation and impairment of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A-like line exists above operating profit and sits alongside the selected XSGA component rows ('Other external expenses', 'Personnel costs', 'Other operating expenses'), suggesting it is not embedded in those selected rows. But the row is a combined total including impairment and is not clearly SG&A-specific versus company-wide/COGS-related, so adding it to XSGA_DA would be unsafe without manual allocation.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA component rows appear to exclude this separate D&A line, but the visible line combines depreciation, amortisation, and impairment for operating activities overall and cannot be cleanly assigned to SG&A only from the excerpt.
